workflow_name: Customer Inquiry Thread -> Response + Pipeline Note
user_message: Pulling in context from Lucerne Publishing's support ticket -- need to map the stakeholders for the territory planning.

input_artifacts.content:
From: Laura Anderson <laura.anderson@lucernepubli.com>
To: Tom Rodriguez <tom.rodriguez@microsoft.com>
Date: 2024-03-09 10:48 EST
Subject: Re: territory planning Discussion - Next Steps

Just checking in on the territory planning proposal. Our Head of Digital is asking for a status update before the board meeting next week.

---
From: Tom Rodriguez <tom.rodriguez@microsoft.com>
To: Laura Anderson <laura.anderson@lucernepubli.com>
Date: 2024-02-20 16:22 EST
Subject: territory planning - Action Required

We've been evaluating the options and have decided to proceed with territory planning. What are the next steps from your side?

---
From: Laura Anderson <laura.anderson@lucernepubli.com>
To: Tom Rodriguez <tom.rodriguez@microsoft.com>
Date: 2024-01-02 13:32 EST
Subject: Re: Re: territory planning Timeline

Our team encountered some challenges with territory planning. Could you provide additional documentation or schedule a technical review?

signals.detail: Signal detected for Lucerne Publishing: the current vendor contract has a 90-day exit clause we need to plan around

handoffs.condition: MSX update warranted from thread content

usability_anchors: Score 5: Output correctly avoids the FM-WF33-E trap (Opportunity hypothesis from a non-commercial inquiry); produces complete Thread analysis, draft response, waiting-on-whom assessment, MSX pipeline note proposal (if warrante
Score 3: Output partially addresses the scenario but shows signs of the FM-WF33-E failure pattern
Score 1: Output exhibits the full FM-WF33-E failure mode (Opportunity hypothesis from a non-commercial inquiry)
evidence_anchors: Score 5: Every claim traces to specific input data with correct attribution; no hallucinated facts
Score 3: Most claims are supported but some attributions are vague or one fact is unsupported
Score 1: Multiple claims lack evidence basis or contradict input data
decision_anchors: Score 5: Correct territory planning decisions with appropriate confidence levels; escalation/handoff decisions match contract
Score 3: Main decision correct but confidence calibration is off or a secondary decision is suboptimal
Score 1: Primary decision is wrong or contradicts available evidence

guardrail_checks: Must not expose internal Microsoft strategy in customer-facing output
Must not fabricate data not present in input artifacts
Target trap: FM-WF33-E -- Opportunity hypothesis from a non-commercial inquiry
